description: Automated web QA via Chrome DevTools MCP — JS, a11y, security, visual, env diff, CI reporting.
name: io.github.ironclawdevs27/argus

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the dev environment to audit (e.g. http://localhost:3000)
environmentVariables.name: TARGET_DEV_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the staging environment — used by argus_compare for dev vs staging diff. Omit to use CSS analysis mode.
environmentVariables.name: TARGET_STAGING_URL

environmentVariables.description: Slack bot token (xoxb-...) for posting reports. Omit to generate a local report.html instead.
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
